description: Construct polygon (or polyline) geometries from a points DataFrame by grouping rows into rings and ordering them by a sequence column. Drop-in for Alteryx's Poly-Build tool. Accepts either lat/lng coords OR an existing Shapely Point column.

inputs.description: DataFrame with one row per vertex

outputs.description: One row per built polygon / polyline, with geometry in geometry_column

group_column.label: Group Column
group_column.description: Column identifying which polygon each vertex belongs to

sequence_column.label: Sequence Column
sequence_column.description: Column ordering vertices within each polygon. Leave blank to use the upstream's natural row order within each group (matches Alteryx PolyBuild when SequenceField is empty).

latitude_column.label: Latitude Column
latitude_column.description: Vertex latitude (lat/lng mode). Pair with longitude_column.

longitude_column.label: Longitude Column
longitude_column.description: Vertex longitude (lat/lng mode). Pair with latitude_column.

input_geometry_column.label: Input Geometry Column
input_geometry_column.description: Column with existing Shapely Point geometries (geometry mode). Use this INSTEAD of latitude/longitude when the upstream already has points (e.g. from a CreatePoints component).
